description: Machine-readable registry of prompt assets for aiquan-kb human-agent collaboration.

citation_policy.non_broadcast_requirement: theme / playbook / series / map references should include one sentence describing what problem the page carries

prompts.title: Daily Online Check Ingest Compile
prompts.purpose: run the full daily pipeline from latest online article check through raw capture compile and kb-aware discussion
use_when: the user wants today's latest 快刀廣播站 article checked online before ingest
the source may not yet exist in raw sources
the user wants one end-to-end daily operator flow from capture to compile
inputs: optional source path url or broadcast id
optional reason this article matters today
optional current work context or question

prompts.title: Daily Broadcast Ingest And Discuss
prompts.purpose: ingest one daily broadcast into the repo and immediately turn it into a kb-aware discussion that trains daily AI taste through comparison and extension
use_when: a new daily 快刀廣播站 article should enter the repo
the user wants both ingest and a discussion based on existing kb context
the user wants to train daily AI taste through comparison and extension
inputs: optional current work context or question

prompts.title: Markdown Broadcast Ingest
prompts.purpose: classify and ingest a markdown broadcast source while preserving provenance and deciding write targets
use_when: the source already exists as a markdown file
the source comes from an external browser capture or local markdown source
inputs: why it should enter the repo
outputs: related theme playbook and series targets

prompts.title: Ingest Review
prompts.purpose: review today's newly ingested broadcasts for net-new signal merge pressure and structural impact
use_when: one or more new broadcast cards were added or updated today
inputs: today's new or updated broadcast cards
existing themes playbooks series and maps
outputs: theme playbook and series update suggestions

prompts.title: Compare Broadcast To Existing
prompts.purpose: compare a new broadcast against existing repo pages and decide whether it is net-new duplicate or revision pressure
use_when: a new source looks similar to existing broadcasts themes or series
inputs: closest relevant pages in the repo

prompts.title: Theme Update
prompts.purpose: update a theme or map from a topic-first perspective rather than a single-broadcast perspective
use_when: the user wants to advance a topic such as ai tools education productivity or adoption
inputs: new source or batch of sources
existing theme playbook and map pages

prompts.title: Playbook Extraction
prompts.purpose: extract reusable methods and workflows from one or more broadcasts instead of leaving them as summaries
use_when: one or more broadcasts contain clear actionable steps
the user wants to turn course content into repeatable practice

prompts.title: Series Review
prompts.purpose: review a recurring course series and compile its accumulated patterns evolution and strongest pages
use_when: the user wants to review a recurring column or series
multiple broadcasts belong to the same named series

prompts.title: Repo Maintenance Review
prompts.purpose: review repo structure for cleanup merge opportunities and navigation improvements without ingesting new sources
use_when: there is no new source to ingest
the user wants to improve repo structure and navigability
